title: CBB Rulebook Volume 5 Open Banking Module for Ancillary Service Providers
summary: Requires open banking providers to obtain access to customer accounts only within the regulated account information service and payment initiation service framework and comply with conduct, consent and operational rules.

theme_notes.digital_finance.open_banking: Rulebook module for account information and payment initiation service providers.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Bahrain Open Banking Framework
